answer.question: What breaks if source.ecom.raw_orders changes?
answer.answer: Changes to source.ecom.raw_orders will directly break the staging model stg_orders.sql, which reads from it. This then propagates to break multiple downstream marts models: customers.sql, order_items.sql, and orders.sql, as they depend on stg_orders or other models that depend on it. Specifically, the downstream impacted models are model.customers, model.order_items, model.orders, and model.stg_orders.

citations.description: dbt_model in models/staging/stg_orders.sql reads source.ecom.raw_orders and writes model.stg_orders for dataset `source.ecom.raw_orders`
dbt_model in models/marts/customers.sql reads model.stg_customers, model.orders and writes model.customers for dataset `source.ecom.raw_orders`
dbt_model in models/marts/order_items.sql reads model.stg_order_items, model.stg_orders, model.stg_products and writes model.order_items for dataset `source.ecom.raw_orders`
dbt_model in models/marts/orders.sql reads model.stg_orders, model.order_items and writes model.orders for dataset `source.ecom.raw_orders`
